meta.source: Tournament results, Regulation I team reports and open qualifier data

spreads.label: Assault Vest Max Special Bulk
spreads.notes: Standard. Maximizes SpDef to survive Kyogre Origin Pulse and Flutter Mane Moonblast. 4 Def gives odd HP number for Sitrus Berry efficiency if swapped.
benchmarks: Survives Modest Kyogre Origin Pulse from full HP
Survives Timid Flutter Mane Moonblast in Sunlight
Survives Modest Miraidon Dazzling Gleam

spreads.label: Sitrus Berry Balanced Bulk
spreads.notes: Balanced physical and special bulk. Tera Ghost removes Normal and Fighting weaknesses, prevents Fake Out from being redirected through it.
benchmarks: Survives Jolly Urshifu Surging Strikes 3 hits
Survives Adamant Koraidon Flare Blitz

spreads.label: Safety Goggles Anti-Spore
spreads.notes: Counters Amoonguss Spore/Rage Powder. Use when Amoonguss is common in the meta. Loses AV special bulk.
benchmarks: Immune to Amoonguss Spore and Rage Powder redirection

spreads.label: Choice Band Max Speed
spreads.notes: Primary set. Jolly ensures speed tie win against other base 135 Speed. Choice Band Collision Course OHKOs most non-resistant targets.
benchmarks: OHKOs 4 HP Urshifu with Choice Band Collision Course
OHKOs 252 HP Incineroar with Choice Band Flare Blitz in Sun

spreads.label: Life Orb Bulk + Speed Benchmark
spreads.notes: 60 Spe EVs reach 144 Speed at Lv50, outspeeding base 130 uninvested. Adamant + more HP investment for extra bulk. Drain Punch provides recovery.
benchmarks: Outspeeds uninvested base 130 Speed Pokémon
Survives Kyogre Water Spout at full HP with 196 HP EVs

spreads.label: Trick Room Brave
spreads.notes: 0 IVs Speed + Brave nature minimizes Speed for Trick Room priority. Paired with Porygon2 or Cresselia TR setters.

spreads.label: Choice Specs Max Output
spreads.notes: Primary set. Timid outspeeds base 130 Speed. Hadron Engine + Choice Specs Electro Drift reaches ~300 effective SpAtk. Tera Electric removes Dragon weakness.
benchmarks: OHKOs 252 HP Iron Hands with Choice Specs Electro Drift in Electric Terrain
OHKOs 4 HP Koraidon with Draco Meteor

spreads.label: Assault Vest Bulky Attacker
spreads.notes: Bulkier approach. Parabolic Charge spread for HP recovery. Modest trades speed for extra SpAtk. Tera Fairy removes Dragon weakness.
benchmarks: Survives Calyrex-Shadow Astral Barrage from full HP

spreads.label: Choice Specs Max Output
spreads.notes: Standard. Protosynthesis in sun boosts SpAtk to ~203 effective. Psyshock hits Assault Vest users on Def stat.
benchmarks: OHKOs 252 HP Incineroar with Moonblast in Sunlight
OHKOs 4 HP Urshifu with Shadow Ball

spreads.label: Focus Sash Lead
spreads.notes: Lead set. Focus Sash guarantees survival on first hit. Taunt blocks Trick Room setup, speed control moves.
benchmarks: Guaranteed survival from full HP regardless of incoming damage

spreads.label: Booster Energy Sun Attacker
spreads.notes: Booster Energy activates when not in Sunlight. Modest for extra SpAtk when not using Protosynthesis. Tera Normal + Boomburst alternative for spread.

spreads.label: Assault Vest Trick Room
spreads.notes: Standard. 0 IVs Speed ensures Iron Hands acts first under Trick Room vs other slow Pokémon. Quark Drive in Electric Terrain boosts Attack 30%.
benchmarks: Effective 182 Attack with Quark Drive in Electric Terrain
OHKOs 4 HP Calyrex-Shadow with Close Combat
Survives multiple neutral hits with 252 HP

spreads.label: Life Orb Trick Room Burst
spreads.notes: Higher burst damage than AV. Life Orb + QD gives enormous output but reduces longevity. Tera Normal for Hyper Voice spread option.

spreads.label: Choice Scarf Speed Control
spreads.notes: Most common set. Scarf outspeeds Calyrex-Shadow. Thunder has 100% accuracy in Rain. Water Spout at full HP is strongest option.
benchmarks: Outspeeds Timid Calyrex-Shadow with Choice Scarf
Thunder 100% accuracy in Drizzle rain
Water Spout = 150 BP at full HP in rain

spreads.label: Choice Specs Max SpAtk
spreads.notes: Timid for speed tie vs other base 90. Specs for higher damage ceiling but locked into moves. Less speed control flexibility than Scarf.
benchmarks: OHKOs 252 HP Incineroar with Origin Pulse in rain

spreads.label: Assault Vest Bulky Attacker
spreads.notes: Tera Grass neutralizes Electric and Grass weaknesses. AV + high SpDef base creates enormous special bulk. Slower but harder to KO.
benchmarks: Survives Timid Miraidon Choice Specs Electro Drift in Electric Terrain

spreads.label: Focus Sash Lead
spreads.notes: Standard. Focus Sash guarantees one Astral Barrage. Expanding Force in Psychic Terrain = 130 BP + Barrage-like power. Timid outspeeds base 135 uninvested.
benchmarks: Guaranteed survival on first hit with Focus Sash
Expanding Force 130 BP in Psychic Terrain vs single target

spreads.label: Life Orb Max Output
spreads.notes: Higher ceiling damage. Psyshock hits Assault Vest Incineroar and Urshifu on physical Def. More risk from Life Orb recoil.

spreads.label: Assault Vest Trick Room
spreads.notes: Primary set. 0 IVs Speed + Brave minimizes Speed for TR priority. Glacial Lance 120 BP spread. High Horsepower Steel coverage. AV patches weak SpDef.
benchmarks: Glacial Lance OHKOs 4 HP Calyrex-Shadow
Effectively ~248 Attack at Lv50 with 252 EVs

spreads.label: Choice Band Maximum Damage
spreads.notes: Higher damage ceiling. Choice Band Glacial Lance threatens OHKOs on more targets. Loses AV special bulk.
benchmarks: Choice Band Glacial Lance OHKOs 4 HP Miraidon

spreads.label: Mental Herb Max HP Support
spreads.notes: Standard lead. Mental Herb cures Taunt once. Prankster Tailwind sets speed control before any opponent acts. Taunt shuts down Trick Room setters.
benchmarks: Prankster Tailwind acts before all non-priority moves
Prankster Taunt prevents Trick Room on same turn

spreads.label: Safety Goggles Anti-Spore
spreads.notes: Immune to Amoonguss Spore. Bleakwind Storm = spread Flying 100 BP 30% Speed drop. Tera Electric removes Flying weakness to Ice/Rock.

spreads.label: Sitrus Berry Max Physical Bulk
spreads.notes: Standard. Bold + max Def survives physical hits long enough for multiple Spores. Tera Water removes Fire and Ice weaknesses. Pollen Puff heals partner.
benchmarks: Survives Adamant Koraidon Flare Blitz
Survives Jolly Urshifu Wicked Blow critical hit

spreads.label: Rocky Helmet Chip Damage
spreads.notes: Rocky Helmet punishes contact moves +1/6 HP per hit. Effective against Urshifu Surging Strikes (3 hits × 1/6 = 50% damage returned).
benchmarks: Rocky Helmet deals 50% total HP damage vs Urshifu Surging Strikes

spreads.label: Choice Specs Max Output
spreads.notes: Standard. Good as Gold blocks Spore, Taunt, and Rage Powder. Make It Rain hits both opponents at 120 BP (75×1.5 spread). Recover maintains longevity.
benchmarks: Make It Rain: effectively 90 BP vs each target after spread modifier
Immune to all status moves via Good as Gold

spreads.label: Assault Vest Bulky Attacker
spreads.notes: Trades speed for bulk. AV + base 91 SpDef + Modest SpAtk creates durable spread threat. Tera Fairy for Dark immunity.

spreads.label: Mental Herb Max Defense
spreads.notes: Primary Trick Room setter. Mental Herb guarantees one Trick Room vs Taunt. Lunar Dance fully revives partner. Tera Steel removes Bug, Ghost, Dark weaknesses.
benchmarks: Survives Adamant Koraidon Collision Course
Lunar Dance is VGC's only PP-restoring full revival move

spreads.label: Sitrus Berry Balanced Bulk
spreads.notes: Calm boosts SpDef for special bulk. Moonblast for Dark-type coverage. Tera Ghost makes Cresselia immune to Normal and Fighting moves.

spreads.label: Eviolite Max Defense
spreads.notes: Eviolite multiplies Def and SpDef by ×1.5. Download may boost SpAtk or Def automatically. Recover ensures longevity for multiple TR cycles.
benchmarks: Eviolite Def = effectively 135 base Defense
Eviolite SpDef = effectively 142 base SpDef
Survives most super-effective special hits with Eviolite

spreads.label: Eviolite Max Special Bulk
spreads.notes: Calm when facing more special attackers. Tera Ghost removes Normal weakness to Fighting. Shadow Ball for Ghost coverage after Tera.

spreads.label: Choice Band Max Damage
spreads.notes: Grassy Glide has +1 priority in Grassy Terrain. Choice Band + Tera Grass Grassy Glide is extremely strong priority damage. High Horsepower immune to Grassy Terrain reduction.
benchmarks: Grassy Glide +1 priority in own Grassy Terrain
High Horsepower bypasses Grassy Terrain Earthquake reduction

spreads.label: Assault Vest Bulky Attacker
spreads.notes: AV for special survivability. Tera Fire removes Ice and Fire weaknesses for one turn. Good in rain matchups.

spreads.label: Focus Sash Lead
spreads.notes: Sword of Ruin drops all Defense by 25% on entry. Focus Sash guarantees survival. Sucker Punch priority. Sacred Sword ignores stat changes.
benchmarks: Sword of Ruin reduces all Pokémon's Defense by 25%
Icicle Crash effective BP vs Sword of Ruin targets = ~163 effective

spreads.label: Choice Band Max Power
spreads.notes: Adamant for max damage. Choice Band OHKOs most targets factoring Sword of Ruin Defense drop. Ice Shard priority for weakened targets.

spreads.label: Assault Vest Supreme Overlord
spreads.notes: Supreme Overlord: +10% Attack per fainted ally (max +50%). AV patches SpDef weakness. Defiant converts Intimidate to net +2 Attack. Kowtow Cleave never misses.
benchmarks: With 5 fainted allies: effective Attack ~202.5 before item
Defiant: Intimidate results in net +2 Attack (= ignores -1, gains +2)

spreads.label: Life Orb Speed Speed Control
spreads.notes: Jolly + max Spe for speed control outside TR. Life Orb for early-game pressure before Supreme Overlord stacks. Tera Fighting removes 4× Fighting weakness temporarily.

spreads.label: Booster Energy Fast Attacker
spreads.notes: Protosynthesis + Booster Energy boosts Attack 30% = effective 170. Gen 9 Rapid Spin raises Speed +1 AND clears hazards. Jolly outspeeds base 85 uninvested after Rapid Spin.
benchmarks: Rapid Spin raises Speed +1 in Gen 9
Effective 170 Attack with Protosynthesis boost

spreads.label: Assault Vest Bulky Attacker
spreads.notes: AV + 115 HP creates enormous physical bulk on a 131 Def base. Adamant for max damage. Ice Spinner removes opposing terrain. Tera Water handles Fire weakness.
benchmarks: Survives Calyrex-Ice Glacial Lance at full HP with AV

spreads.label: Choice Scarf Speed Control
spreads.notes: Beads of Ruin drops all SpDef by 25%. Scarf + base 100 Speed outspeeds most threats. Heat Wave spread + Beads of Ruin = massive effective output. Snarl spread drops SpAtk.
benchmarks: Beads of Ruin reduces all SpDef by 25%
Heat Wave effective power with Beads of Ruin: ~118 effective BP

spreads.label: Choice Specs Max SpAtk
spreads.notes: Modest Choice Specs + Beads of Ruin = enormous SpAtk ceiling. Tera Flying for Ground immunity and Tera Blast coverage. Slower than Scarf but hits significantly harder.

spreads.label: Life Orb Rapid Strike
spreads.notes: Unseen Fist bypasses Protect on contact moves. Surging Strikes 3-hit always crits = 168.75 effective BP in rain. Aqua Jet priority. Jolly for speed control.
benchmarks: Surging Strikes bypasses Protect via Unseen Fist
3 guaranteed crits: effective 168.75 BP in Rain
Surging Strikes never misses Protect

spreads.label: Choice Band Max Power
spreads.notes: Adamant Choice Band for maximum Close Combat / Surging Strikes damage. U-turn for momentum. Trades speed for power.
benchmarks: Choice Band Surging Strikes crits = OHKOs most uninvested targets in rain

spreads.label: Life Orb Max Speed
spreads.notes: Standard offensive spread. Psystrike calculates against physical Defense — exceptional against high SpDef targets like Cresselia and Porygon2. 188 max Speed outspeeds Eternatus and everything below.
benchmarks: 188 Speed — outspeeds Eternatus max Speed (188 tie, Timid wins speed tie on average)
Timid Psystrike OHKOs uninvested Kyogre after Life Orb under Psychic Terrain
Ice Beam covers Koraidon, Rayquaza, Landorus-Therian in one slot

spreads.label: Choice Scarf Speed Control
spreads.notes: Scarf stat = 282 — outspeeds all non-Scarf Pokémon including Calyrex-Shadow (222). Use when Tailwind support is unavailable. Locks into one move per switch-in.
benchmarks: 282 Speed with Scarf — outspeeds Calyrex-Shadow 222 and Zacian 200
Shadow Ball coverage for Ghost-types and Calyrex-Ice

spreads.label: Bulky Attacker
spreads.notes: Used in Trick Room teams or when Tailwind support is reliable. Modest adds ~10% SpAtk over Timid. Tera Ghost removes Normal weakness and prevents Fake Out. Sacrifices Speed matchup against Calyrex-Shadow.
benchmarks: Modest Psystrike OHKOs Assault Vest Incineroar after chip
252 HP survives Jolly Koraidon Collision Course at full HP

spreads.label: Max Attack Max Speed (standard)
spreads.notes: Standard Zacian with Rusted Sword (Crowned form, +10 Attack). Intrepid Sword +1 on entry means effective Attack is 255 from turn 1. 200 max Speed — fastest Steel-type restricted. Jolly outspeeds Mewtwo Timid (188) and Koraidon/Miraidon (205) at max.
benchmarks: 200 Speed — outspeeds Mewtwo Timid (188) and Eternatus Timid (188)
Intrepid Sword +1 Atk on entry: effective Attack 255 from turn 1
Behemoth Blade OHKOs uninvested Calyrex-Ice (Steel vs Ice/Psychic)
Close Combat + Tera Fairy removes Close Combat's Defense drop concern

spreads.label: Bulky Speed (EV shift to HP)
spreads.notes: 92 Speed EVs reaches 167 — still outspeeds Kyogre max speed (156) and most common support Pokémon. HP EVs improve survivability against Calyrex-Shadow Astral Barrage. Tera Normal makes Behemoth Blade 120 BP Normal type — avoids Ghost immunity.
benchmarks: 167 Speed outspeeds max Kyogre (156), max Groudon (156)
164 HP EVs: survives Timid Calyrex-Shadow Astral Barrage at full HP (needs verification vs Life Orb)

spreads.label: Life Orb Max Attack
spreads.notes: Paired with Calyrex-Shadow in dual-restricted Sun teams. 156 max Speed ties Kyogre. Precipice Blades 120 BP spread at 150 Atk under Sun is the highest physical spread damage in format. Rock Slide provides spread flinch coverage.
benchmarks: 156 Speed ties Kyogre max Speed — both move simultaneously, avoiding speed loss
Adamant Precipice Blades OHKOs uninvested Miraidon
Tera Fire Fire Punch under Sun OHKOs Calyrex-Ice (x4 Fire weakness)

spreads.label: Assault Vest Bulky Physical
spreads.notes: Maximizes survivability for sustained presence. 164 SpDef EVs with AV allows Groudon to survive Timid Kyogre Origin Pulse in Rain — critical for weather-war matchups. Solar Blade one-turn under Sun for Kyogre/Rain types.
benchmarks: AV + 164 SpDef: survives Timid Kyogre Origin Pulse in Rain at full HP
252 HP survives Jolly Calyrex-Ice Glacial Lance (needs Tera or partner support)
